home.heroBody: Brand strategy, identity, content, and 3D visuals that convert.
home.projectsTitle: Same motion system, now wrapped in the Creative visual language.
home.projectsBody: The layout stays editorial and kinetic, but the surfaces, color temperature, and typography now follow the softer premium theme from the reference site.

product.title: A booster rocket for digital product teams

faq.title: Curated for the curious.
faq.companyQuote: We value clarity and outcomes over billable hours.

productPage.contactBody: We are always up for meeting new teams. If you have a product in motion, a concept that needs shape, or a launch that needs sharper direction, let's talk.
productPage.managingPartnerTitle: Managing Partner and Head of Products

projectDetail.colorStoryBody: The carefully curated palette that brings the digital experience to life.
projectDetail.projectImpactBody: Key outcomes that define the project's success and lasting value.

quote.dialogDescription: Multi-step project brief builder used to prepare a quote request.
quote.headerIntro: Shape a project brief in four short steps. On submit, we open a prefilled email draft to `newbusiness@hellomonday.com`.
quote.step01Description: Choose the outcomes you want this quote to support.
quote.step02Description: Define the service lanes and outputs you expect.
quote.step03Description: Set your expected schedule and investment range.
quote.step04Description: Tell us where to send the quote and follow-up.
quote.goalFocusBody: Select one or more outcomes for this project.
quote.projectContextBody: Share the audience, challenge, or launch context behind the request.
quote.projectContextPlaceholder: We need a premium launch site for a new product line...
quote.servicesBody: Choose the service lanes you want included in the quote.
quote.deliverablesBody: Select the outputs you expect from this engagement.
quote.timelineBody: Pick the rough delivery window you have in mind.
quote.budgetBody: Optional, but useful for keeping the proposal realistic.
quote.budgetPlaceholder: Launch dates, constraints, markets, or extra notes...
quote.contactDetailsBody: We will prefill an email draft so your team can review it before sending.
quote.successMessage: Email draft opened. The brief was also copied to your clipboard.
quote.discardConfirm: Are you sure you want to close? Your quote request progress will be lost.
